title: Fix sign in limiter when there is evaporation/sublimation

body: Prognostic-EDMF (nightly config) is unstable with reduced scalar hyperdiffusion (compared to CAM_SE config). This PR reduces the hyperdiff prandtl number to provide sufficient hyperdiffusion for stability.
title: Fix hyperdiff prandtl to stabilize prog-edmf nightly build
